_meta.privacy: Only anonymous aggregate member-support profiles are published. Supporter groups below minSupport do not expose breakdowns; profile cells below minCell are omitted.
notes: 2025 ranked/top3/top1 are derived from member ranking question 2025-Q03.
2026 favorite is derived from multi-select question 2026-Q04; most_2_3 and most_4 are separate single-select questions and are not a unified all-member top1 metric.
Rates compare each member supporter group against the same-year overall answered base for that signal.

2025.label: 入榜成员
2025.description: 2025 ranking question: member appears in the ranked list. Recommended as the default profile lens.

2025.label: Top3 成员
2025.description: 2025 ranking question: member is ranked in the top 3.

2025.label: 首推成员
2025.description: 2025 ranking question: member is ranked first.

2026.label: 有好感成员
2026.description: 2026 multi-select favorite members. Recommended as the default profile lens.

2026.label: 最喜欢二/三期
2026.description: 2026 single-select favorite member among 2nd and 3rd generations. Not a unified all-member top1 metric.

2026.label: 最喜欢四期
2026.description: 2026 single-select favorite 4th generation member. None-of-the-above is excluded.
